'''Black Tongue''' was a [[Whiphid/Legends|Whiphid]] crimelord.

Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Black Tongue attempted to extort millions of credits from [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] by ransoming [[Grubba Desilijic Aarrpo|Grubba]], a nephew of Jabba. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] happened upon Grubba on [[Faldos]] and took the young Hutt back to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in the hopes of lessening his debt to Jabba. When Jabba discovered Black Tongue was responsible for the kidnapping, he had him captured and ostensibly killed.
